code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut stop = false
  while i < n and not stop
    # skip whitespace
    while i < n and is_ws(byte_at_or(line, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i >= n
      i = n
    else
      mut sign = 1
      let b0 = byte_at_or(line, i)
      if b0 == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b0 == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut has = false
      while i < n and is_digit(byte_at_or(line, i))
        let d = byte_at_or(line, i) - 48
        val = val * 10 + d
        i = i + 1
        has = true
      end
      if has
        let signed = val * sign
        if signed < 0
          stop = true
        else
          sum = sum + signed
        end
      else
        i = n
      end
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
end

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end
